decisions.description: Version the API instead of changing limits on existing endpoints
Hold the mobile app work until Q4 due to lack of design capacity

action_items.description: Prepare the CSV export feature for release by Friday
QA the CSV export by Thursday
Draft a customer migration guide for the API changes by end of next week
Update the roadmap doc and share it with the wider team

key_facts: Q3 roadmap focus is CSV export and API rate-limit changes
Changing existing rate limits risks breaking current integrations
